Accumulated sensor drift resulting from long-term operation.
accuracy - Variable in class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice

Acknowledges an active alert.
acknowledge(String) - Method in class cpdt.backend.services.AlertFetch
Marks an alert as acknowledged.
activate() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.EquipmentFailureScenario

activate() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.OverheatScenario

activate() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario
Activates the scenario.
ADC_RESOLUTION_BITS - Static variable in class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice
Resolution of the simulated analog-to-digital converter in bits.
AlarmState - Enum Class in cpdt.common.enums
Represents the state transition of a process alarm after evaluating newly received telemetry.
AlarmStateService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Tracks the active alarm state of registered devices.
AlarmStateService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.AlarmStateService
 
AlarmThresholdEntity - Class in cpdt.backend.entities
Represents alarm threshold configuration for a process measurement.
AlarmThresholdEntity() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.entities.AlarmThresholdEntity
 
AlarmThresholdRepository - Interface in cpdt.backend.repositories
Repository for accessing alarm threshold configurations.
AlertController - Class in cpdt.backend.controllers
Exposes REST endpoints for managing process alarms.
AlertController() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.controllers.AlertController
 
AlertEntity - Class in cpdt.backend.entities
Represents an alarm generated by the Digital Twin backend.
AlertEntity() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.entities.AlertEntity
 
AlertEvaluationService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Evaluates telemetry measurements to determine alarm conditions.
AlertEvaluationService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.AlertEvaluationService
 
AlertFetch - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Provides retrieval and management operations for persisted alerts.
AlertFetch() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.AlertFetch
 
alertId() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.AlertMessage
Returns the value of the alertId record component.
AlertMessage - Record Class in cpdt.common.dto
Represents an alert generated by the backend and published to interested subscribers.
AlertMessage(String, String, AlertSeverity, String, long) - Constructor for record class cpdt.common.dto.AlertMessage
Creates an instance of a AlertMessage record class.
AlertPersistenceService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Persists generated alerts to the database.
AlertPersistenceService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.AlertPersistenceService
 
AlertRepository - Interface in cpdt.backend.repositories
Repository for accessing persisted alert records.
AlertSeverity - Enum Class in cpdt.common.enums
Defines the severity level assigned to an alert generated by the Digital Twin.
applyAdcQuantization(double) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice
Applies 16-bit ADC quantization to a measured value.
area() - Method in record class cpdt.common.models.Location
Returns the value of the area record component.

BackendApplication - Class in cpdt.backend
 
BackendApplication() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.BackendApplication
 
build(TelemetryPacket) - Static method in class cpdt.common.utils.TopicBuilder
Builds the MQTT topic for the specified telemetry packet.

C

calculateHardwareResolution() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice
Calculates the hardware resolution of the sensor.
clearAlarm(String) - Method in class cpdt.backend.services.AlarmStateService
Clears the active alarm associated with a device.
CLEARED - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.AlarmState
 
clearScenario(Scenario) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.ScenarioEngine
Deactivates an active scenario and allows it to complete any remaining recovery or cooldown behavior before removal.
connect() - Method in class cpdt.backend.mqtt.DeviceStatusPublisher
Establishes a connection to the MQTT broker.
ConsoleTelemetryPublisher - Class in cpdt.simulator.engine
 
ConsoleTelemetryPublisher() - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.engine.ConsoleTelemetryPublisher
 
CONTROL_VALVE - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.DeviceType
 
COOLING_SECTION - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.ProcessArea
 
cpdt.backend - package cpdt.backend
Implements the backend module of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin.
cpdt.backend.config - package cpdt.backend.config
Provides Spring configuration classes for the backend module.
cpdt.backend.controllers - package cpdt.backend.controllers
Provides REST controllers for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.entities - package cpdt.backend.entities
Defines the persistent entities used by the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.exception - package cpdt.backend.exception
Defines exception types and global exception handling for the backend.
cpdt.backend.mqtt - package cpdt.backend.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.repositories - package cpdt.backend.repositories
Defines the data access layer for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.services - package cpdt.backend.services
Implements the business logic of the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.twin - package cpdt.backend.twin
Provides components for maintaining the Digital Twin state.
cpdt.common.dto - package cpdt.common.dto
Provides the Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.enums - package cpdt.common.enums
Provides the enumerated types used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.models - package cpdt.common.models
Provides the core domain models used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.utils - package cpdt.common.utils
Provides utility classes shared across the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator - package cpdt.simulator
Provides the simulation layer of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.bootstrap - package cpdt.simulator.bootstrap
 
cpdt.simulator.devices - package cpdt.simulator.devices
Contains implementations of simulated devices, including sensors and future actuators.
cpdt.simulator.engine - package cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.environment - package cpdt.simulator.environment
Provides the environmental model used by the chemical plant simulator.
cpdt.simulator.mqtt - package cpdt.simulator.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for publishing simulated telemetry to external systems and vice versa.
cpdt.simulator.scenarios - package cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.
CRITICAL - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.DeviceStatus
 
CRITICAL_HIGH - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.AlertSeverity
 
CRITICAL_LOW - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.AlertSeverity
 
CURRENT - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.MeasurementType
 
CURRENT_SENSOR - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.DeviceType

deactivate() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.OverpressureScenario
 
deactivate() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario
Deactivates the scenario.
DEESCALATED - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.AlarmState
 
Device - Class in cpdt.common.models
Abstract base class representing a physical device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
Device(String, String, DeviceType, Location) - Constructor for class cpdt.common.models.Device
Constructs a new device with the specified identity and location.
DeviceController - Class in cpdt.backend.controllers
Exposes REST endpoints for accessing registered device information.
DeviceController(DeviceRepository) - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.controllers.DeviceController
Creates a controller for accessing device information.
DeviceEntity - Class in cpdt.backend.entities
Represents a registered device within the Digital Twin backend.

Returns the value of the deviceId record component.

Returns the value of the deviceId record component.
deviceId() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.TelemetryPacket
Returns the value of the deviceId record component.
DeviceIdGenerator - Class in cpdt.common.utils
Utility class responsible for generating unique device identifiers for simulated plant devices.
deviceName() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.TelemetryPacket
Returns the value of the deviceName record component.
DevicePersistenceService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Manages the persistence of registered device information.
DevicePersistenceService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.DevicePersistenceService
 
DeviceRepository - Interface in cpdt.backend.repositories
Repository for accessing registered device information.
DeviceStatus - Enum Class in cpdt.common.enums
Represents the current operational status of a device within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
DeviceStatusMessage - Record Class in cpdt.common.dto
Represents a device status update exchanged between system components.
DeviceStatusMessage(String, DeviceStatus, String, long) - Constructor for record class cpdt.common.dto.DeviceStatusMessage
Creates an instance of a DeviceStatusMessage record class.
DeviceStatusPublisher - Class in cpdt.backend.mqtt
Publishes device status updates to the MQTT broker.
DeviceStatusPublisher(String, String, int) - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.mqtt.DeviceStatusPublisher
Creates a publisher for device status messages.
DeviceStatusService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Manages operational status updates for registered devices.
DeviceStatusService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.DeviceStatusService
 
DeviceStatusSubscriber - Class in cpdt.simulator.mqtt
DeviceStatusSubscriber subscribes to backend-published device status updates over MQTT and applies them to the simulator in real time.
DeviceStatusSubscriber(String, String, SimulatorEngine) - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.mqtt.DeviceStatusSubscriber
Creates a new MQTT subscriber for receiving device status updates.
deviceType() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.TelemetryPacket
Returns the value of the deviceType record component.
DeviceType - Enum Class in cpdt.common.enums
Enumerates every supported device type that can exist within the Chemical Plant Digital Twin Platform.
DISTILLATION_SECTION - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.ProcessArea
 
driftVariancePerHour - Variable in class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice
Variance of the drift process expressed per hour of operation.

Retrieves all currently active alerts.

Returns an unmodifiable view of all environmental measurements maintained by this process area.

Retrieves the current environmental value corresponding to this sensor's measurement type and process area.

Retrieves the current value of the specified environmental measurement from the given process area.

Provides centralized exception handling for REST controllers.

H

handle(Message<byte[]>) - Method in class cpdt.backend.mqtt.TelemetryMessageHandler
Processes an incoming MQTT telemetry message.
handleGenericException(Exception) - Method in class cpdt.backend.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles unexpected exceptions that occur during request processing.
handleInvalidTelemetry(InvalidTelemetryException) - Method in class cpdt.backend.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles invalid telemetry exceptions.

Handles invalid request parameter type conversions.
handleMissingRequestParameter(MissingServletRequestParameterException) - Method in class cpdt.backend.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
Handles requests with missing required parameters.

Returns the value of the processArea record component.
ProcessArea - Enum Class in cpdt.common.enums
Represents the distinct process areas within the simulated chemical plant.
ProcessAreaEnvironment - Class in cpdt.simulator.environment
Represents the physical environmental conditions within a single process area of the simulated chemical plant.
ProcessAreaEnvironment(ProcessArea) - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.environment.ProcessAreaEnvironment
Creates a new environment for the specified process area and initializes all supported measurements with their default values.

Publishes a device status update to the MQTT broker.
publish(TelemetryPacket) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.ConsoleTelemetryPublisher
 
publish(TelemetryPacket) - Method in interface cpdt.simulator.engine.TelemetryPublisher
Publishes a telemetry packet to the configured destination.
publish(TelemetryPacket) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.mqtt.MqttTelemetryPublisher
Publishes a telemetry packet to the MQTT broker.
PUMP - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.DeviceType

Scenario - Class in cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Base abstraction for all simulation scenarios.
Scenario(String, String, ProcessArea, PlantEnvironment) - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario
Constructs a simulation scenario.
ScenarioEngine - Class in cpdt.simulator.engine
Manages the lifecycle and execution of all active simulation scenarios.
ScenarioEngine(PlantEnvironment) - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.engine.ScenarioEngine
 
SensorDevice - Class in cpdt.simulator
Base abstraction for all field sensors.
SensorDevice(String, String, DeviceType, Location, MeasurementType, PlantEnvironment) - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice
Creates a new sensor device.
setActive(boolean) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario
Sets the activation state of the scenario.
setEnvironmentalValue(MeasurementType, double) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.environment.ProcessAreaEnvironment
Updates the value of the specified environmental measurement and records the time of the modification.
setValue(ProcessArea, MeasurementType, double) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.environment.PlantEnvironment
Updates the value of a specific environmental measurement within the given process area.
severity() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.AlertMessage
Returns the value of the severity record component.
shutdown() - Method in class cpdt.backend.mqtt.DeviceStatusPublisher
Closes the MQTT connection and releases associated resources.
shutdown() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.mqtt.MqttTelemetryPublisher
Gracefully disconnects from the MQTT broker and releases all MQTT resources.
SimulatorEngine - Class in cpdt.simulator.engine
Coordinates the execution of the chemical plant simulation.
SimulatorEngine(List<SensorDevice>, TelemetryPublisher, ScenarioEngine) - Constructor for class cpdt.simulator.engine.SimulatorEngine
Creates a new simulator engine with the required simulation components.
start() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.SimulatorEngine
 
start() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.mqtt.DeviceStatusSubscriber
Connects to the MQTT broker and subscribes to the device status topic.
status() - Method in record class cpdt.backend.exception.ErrorResponse
Returns the value of the status record component.
status() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.DeviceStatusMessage
Returns the value of the status record component.
status() - Method in record class cpdt.common.dto.TelemetryPacket
Returns the value of the status record component.
stop() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.SimulatorEngine
 
stop() - Method in class cpdt.simulator.mqtt.DeviceStatusSubscriber
Disconnects from the MQTT broker and releases all associated MQTT resources.

T

TANK - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.DeviceType
 
TelemetryController - Class in cpdt.backend.controllers
Exposes REST endpoints for querying historical telemetry data.
TelemetryController() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.controllers.TelemetryController
 
TelemetryEntity - Class in cpdt.backend.entities
Represents a telemetry measurement received from a plant device.
TelemetryEntity() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.entities.TelemetryEntity
 
TelemetryIngestionService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Processes incoming telemetry received from the MQTT layer.
TelemetryIngestionService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.TelemetryIngestionService
 
TelemetryMessageHandler - Class in cpdt.backend.mqtt
Handles telemetry messages received from the MQTT broker.
TelemetryMessageHandler() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.mqtt.TelemetryMessageHandler
 
TelemetryPacket - Record Class in cpdt.common.dto
Represents a telemetry reading produced by a simulated device and exchanged between the simulator and backend.
TelemetryPacket(String, String, DeviceType, DeviceStatus, String, String, ProcessArea, long, MeasurementType, double) - Constructor for record class cpdt.common.dto.TelemetryPacket
Creates an instance of a TelemetryPacket record class.
TelemetryPersistenceService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Persists telemetry measurements received by the backend.
TelemetryPersistenceService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.TelemetryPersistenceService
 
TelemetryPublisher - Interface in cpdt.simulator.engine
Defines the contract for publishing telemetry packets generated by the simulator.
TelemetryQueryService - Class in cpdt.backend.services
Provides query operations for historical telemetry data.
TelemetryQueryService() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.services.TelemetryQueryService
 
TelemetryRepository - Interface in cpdt.backend.repositories
Repository for accessing historical telemetry measurements.
TelemetrySerializer - Class in cpdt.common.utils
Utility class responsible for serializing TelemetryPacket objects into JSON strings or byte arrays, and deserializing JSON strings or byte arrays back into TelemetryPacket objects.
TEMPERATURE - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.MeasurementType
 
TEMPERATURE_SENSOR - Enum constant in enum class cpdt.common.enums.DeviceType
 
TemperatureSensor - Class in cpdt.simulator.devices
Represents a simulated resistance temperature detector similar to a Pt100 RTD used within the chemical plant simulation.

Returns the value of the timestamp record component.

Serializes the specified object into its JSON byte array representation.
toJsonString(Object) - Static method in class cpdt.common.utils.TelemetrySerializer
Serializes the specified object into its JSON string representation.

Utility class for constructing MQTT topic strings from TelemetryPacket metadata.

triggerScenario(Scenario) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.ScenarioEngine
Activates a scenario and begins tracking it for periodic updates.
TwinController - Class in cpdt.backend.controllers
Exposes REST endpoints for accessing the Digital Twin state.

TwinDeviceState - Class in cpdt.backend.twin
Represents the current Digital Twin state of a device.
TwinDeviceState() - Constructor for class cpdt.backend.twin.TwinDeviceState
 
TwinStateStore - Class in cpdt.backend.twin
Maintains the current Digital Twin state of all registered devices.

update(long) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.ScenarioEngine
Updates every tracked scenario using the specified simulation time step.

update(long) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.OverpressureScenario
 
update(long) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.scenarios.Scenario
Updates the scenario state.
update(TelemetryPacket) - Method in class cpdt.backend.twin.TwinStateStore
Updates the Digital Twin state using an incoming telemetry packet.
updateAlarmState(String, AlertSeverity) - Method in class cpdt.backend.services.AlarmStateService
Updates the alarm state of a device based on its latest severity.
updateDeviceStatus(String, DeviceStatus) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.engine.SimulatorEngine
Updates the operational status of the sensor with the specified device ID.
updateLongTermDrift(double, ThreadLocalRandom) - Method in class cpdt.simulator.SensorDevice
Updates the accumulated long-term sensor drift.
